Lyrics.text:
‘Lay ora tao Getsemane
Tsaroako tsara izao,
Fa Tompo tia sy lehibe
No ory loatra tao:

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Tsaroako ‘zao Getsemane
‘Zay niaretanao,
Tsy haiko hadinoina re
‘Lay fahoriana tao

Nanjary ra ny dinitrao
Noho ny helokay;
Fadiranovana Ianao
Nisolo voina anay:

Soraty ao am-poko re,
Ho sary velona ao,
Ny sarin’i Getsemane
‘Zay niaretanao:
